name: UBA : Process Executed Outside Gold Disk Allowlist(Windows)
notes:
Detects processes that are created on a Windows system and alerts when the process is outside the golden disk process allowlist.
Note: The rule is disabled by default. Enable the rule only after populating/modifying the process names to be whitelisted in the reference set 'UBA : Gold Disk Process Allowlist - Windows'"
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Gold Disk Process Allowlist -Windows - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Process Executed Outside Gold Disk Allowlist(Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND NOT when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Gold Disk Process Allowlist -Windows - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Process Executed Outside Gold Disk Allowlist(Windows)
